How PRC has breached the Sino-British Joint Declaration:


1. 香港人的言論、集會和新聞自由等等已慢慢被中共奪取。其中最明顯既就係新聞自由，警隊多次係公共場合都阻止記者進行攝錄及採訪，6月12日更以暴力對待記者。香港的大多數書店已經係中聯辦所控制，加上2015年既銅鑼灣書店事件更加令人覺得香港既出版自由已經蕩然無存。

Joint Declaration主文第3段(5):
The current social and economic systems in Hong Kong will remain unchanged, and so will the life-style. Rights and freedoms, including those of the person, of speech, of the press, of assembly, of association, of travel, of movement, of correspondence, of strike, of choice of occupation, of academic research and of religious belief will be ensured by law in the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. Private property, ownership of enterprises, legitimate right of inheritance and foreign investment will be protected by law.




2. 香港不再享有高度的自主權，立法、執法和司法機關皆受到中共壓力而不再獨立公正。特首和立法會選舉已被中共操控，顯而易見。自董建華政府以來，香港的行政和立法深受中共影響，而且更有嚴重惡化之勢。

Joint Declaration主文第3段(2):
The Hong Kong Special Administrative Region will enjoy a high degree of autonomy

Joint Declaration主文第3段(3):
The Hong Kong Special Administrative Region will be vested with executive, legislative and independent judicial power, including that of final adjudication.




3. 香港的財政並不獨立，中共多年來間接地淘空香港政府財政儲備。香港多年黎以高深圳、東莞近7倍的天價購入東江水；大白象工程如三跑、高鐵及現在將撥備的明日大嶼，皆是天價工程及有私相授受之嫌。

Joint Declaration主文第3段(8):
The Hong Kong Special Administrative Region will have independent finances.

Joint Declaration Annex I 第V段:
The Hong Kong Special Administrative Region shall use its financial revenues exclusively for its own purposes and they shall not be handed over to the Central People's Government.




最後以上提及過既都應該係要回歸後維持50年不變。

Joint Declaration主文第3段(12):
(12) The above-stated basic policies of the People's Republic of China regarding Hong Kong and the elaboration of them in Annex I to this Joint Declaration will be stipulated, in a Basic Law of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China, by the National People's Congress of the People's Republic of China, and they will remain unchanged for 50 years.

Dear Sirs,
UK cannot keep a promise, proved by the Sino-British Joint Declaration. Please take care, EU.

最後以上提及過既都應該係要回歸後維持50年不變。

replies.msg:
希望幫到手
1. The freedom of HongKongers, with the freedom of speech, freedom of assembly and freedom of the Press included, are gradually exploited by the PRC Government. The freedom of the Press would be the most obvious example. The HK Police Force has made every effort to prohibit the Press from recording and interviewing. Worse still, the Press was violently treated on 12 June 2019. Moreover, most bookstores of Hong Kong are controlled by the PRC government. The Causeway Bay Bookstore Incident in 2015-2016 further indicated the vanishing freedom of the Press. Lee Po, a person-in-charge of the Causeway Bay Books and a British citizen, ‘was disappeared’ in late December 2015. According to BBC News (2016), he was said probably to be ‘involuntarily removed from Hong Kong to mainland China. And this has been generally perceived as the act of the Mainland Police Force appointed by the Central government of the PRC. According to Phillips (2016), Lee appeared to have been snatched in the afternoon on 30 December after being lured to a warehouse in Hong Kong where his company stored its sensational tomes on communist party chieftains. Lee was targeted since his company, Causeway Bay Books, has published a multitude of books expounding power struggles and scandals in the Communist Party (O'Neill, 2016). However, Hong Kong residents shall have freedom of the Press and of publication with reference to the Article 27 of the Basic Law. The personal security of Lee Po was under serious threat largely because of the publication of the sensational books sold by him. It definitely goes against with the freedom of the Press and of publication granted by the Basic Law and the Joint Declaration.

The Hong Kong Special Administrative Region will be vested with executive, legislative and independent judicial power, including that of final adjudication.




3. 香港的財政並不獨立，中共多年來間接地淘空香港政府財政儲備。香港多年黎以高深圳、東莞近7倍的天價購入東江水；大白象工程如三跑、高鐵及現在將撥備的明日大嶼，皆是天價工程及有私相授受之嫌。

Joint Declaration主文第3段(8):
The Hong Kong Special Administrative Region will have independent finances.

Joint Declaration Annex I 第V段:
The Hong Kong Special Administrative Region shall use its financial revenues exclusively for its own purposes and they shall not be handed over to the Central People's Government.




最後以上提及過既都應該係要回歸後維持50年不變。

Joint Declaration主文第3段(12):
(12) The above-stated basic policies of the People's Republic of China regarding Hong Kong and the elaboration of them in Annex I to this Joint Declaration will be stipulated, in a Basic Law of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China, by the National People's Congress of the People's Republic of China, and they will remain unchanged for 50 years.

希望幫到手
1. The freedom of HongKongers, with the freedom of speech, freedom of assembly and freedom of the Press included, are gradually exploited by the PRC Government. The freedom of the Press would be the most obvious example. The HK Police Force has made every effort to prohibit the Press from recording and interviewing. Worse still, the Press was violently treated on 12 June 2019. Moreover, most bookstores of Hong Kong are controlled by the PRC government. The Causeway Bay Bookstore Incident in 2015-2016 further indicated the vanishing freedom of the Press. Lee Po, a person-in-charge of the Causeway Bay Books and a British citizen, ‘was disappeared’ in late December 2015. According to BBC News (2016), he was said probably to be ‘involuntarily removed from Hong Kong to mainland China. And this has been generally perceived as the act of the Mainland Police Force appointed by the Central government of the PRC. According to Phillips (2016), Lee appeared to have been snatched in the afternoon on 30 December after being lured to a warehouse in Hong Kong where his company stored its sensational tomes on communist party chieftains. Lee was targeted since his company, Causeway Bay Books, has published a multitude of books expounding power struggles and scandals in the Communist Party (O'Neill, 2016). However, Hong Kong residents shall have freedom of the Press and of publication with reference to the Article 27 of the Basic Law. The personal security of Lee Po was under serious threat largely because of the publication of the sensational books sold by him. It definitely goes against with the freedom of the Press and of publication granted by the Basic Law and the Joint Declaration.

The Executive and Legislative Branch has been largely influenced by the PRC Government since the governance of Tung Chee Hwa and the problem is not compounding. The Joint Declaration indicates that The Hong Kong Special Administrative Region will enjoy a high degree of autonomy except in foreign and defence affairs which are the responsibilities of the Central People's Government. Without doubt, it is at odds with it.

3. The financial allocation of Hong Kong is not independent as the PRC Government has been keeping on extracting the financial reserve of the Hong Kong Government. Hong Kong has been importing Dongjiang water at a high price which is almost 7 times of that of Shenzhen and Dongguan. White Elephant Projects, such as the Third Runway, Guangzhou-Shenzhen-Hong Kong High Speed Rail and Lantau Tomorrow which is to be under preparation for funding -- to name but a few, are not only at an extremely high construction price, but also are suspicious to corruption. With reference to the Annex 1 of the Joint Declaration, the HKSAR shall use its financial revenues exclusively for its own purposes and they shall not be handed over to the Central People’s Government. Nevertheless, the above are vivid examples illustrating that the independent finances granted by the Joint Declaration is disappearing.

如見抗爭者被捕，請大家連同以下資料，聯絡上述單位：
1. 被捕者中文姓名
2. 被捕者英文姓名
3. 被捕者身份證號碼
4. 被捕者乘坐之警車號碼 / 所在警署
問：「出得嚟（遊）行」，有甚麼可以保護自己？
Ｃ：→ 戴口罩（理論跟「速龍小隊」無警員號碼一樣，無仇報。）
ㅤㅤ→ 記得離開示威區才取下口罩。

問：「出得嚟（遊）行」之前，除了帶水、雨傘、口罩，還有甚麼要預備？
Ｃ：→ 把姓名和身份證號碼交給可信賴的朋友、律師或可信任的支援組織；一旦被捕，律師亦較容易在各區警署「撈」到你。
ㅤㅤ→ 把重要的聯絡電話，包括律師及相關支援組織等，寫在紙上，好好收起，又或者寫到手上。

問：被警方拘捕，第一件事該做甚麼？
Ｃ：→ 要求通知律師，在律師到來前，任何情況下，都只說：「我無嘢講」，亦不要簽署任何文件。
ㅤㅤ→ 未必一定可見家人，可請律師代通知家人。

問：警方在拘捕你後，是否有權搜身？
Ｃ：→ 有，但搜身需由相同性別警員進行。
ㅤㅤ→ 一般搜身是拍拍衫袋褲袋，除非懷疑藏有毒品或危險物品，才會要求除衫褲及內衣褲，而如有此情況，必須要求警員落簿記錄，保留日後投訴的權利。

問：警方在拘捕你後，是否有權沒收手機？
Ｃ： 有，但無權要求你解鎖手機/電腦，你可要求警方封袋處理。除非搜查令上寫要查手機/電腦的資料

問：律師到來前，要做甚麼？
Ｃ：→ 就所有要求，都要警員落簿記下，例如 10:00 至 13:00，要求吃飯無飯吃，或者要求驗傷不獲處理，要求見律師話律師不會見你等等，方便律師寫到誓章，日後有機會呈上法庭。
ㅤㅤ→ 如果警員無落簿，自己要想方法記下參考時間。

問： 見到律師前，會遇到甚麼情況？
Ｃ：→ 你會好驚， 然後向警員如數家珍般，和盤托出參與的來龍去脈。請謹記，任何情況下，只需說：「我無嘢講。」
ㅤㅤ→ 警員會有不同技巧盤問你，請謹記，你只需說：「我無嘢講。」
ㅤㅤ→ 沒收手機後，你會好驚，但你是有對外聯絡的權利，請冷靜找出那張緊急聯絡電話的紙，然後聯絡律師。
ㅤㅤ→ 不要以為你只可以打一次電話，你是有權隨時要求見律師 。

問：律師來到，會問甚麼、幫到甚麼？
Ｃ：→ 基本資料，包括姓名、年齡、身份證號碼等（18 歲以下或通知有跟進個案的社工）
ㅤㅤ→ 可代通知家人、朋友
ㅤㅤ→ 有無受傷或不適（例如給警察踢了幾多腳，可以日後投訴），可要求到醫院驗傷
ㅤㅤ→ 額外處理事項，包括有否被沒收眼鏡（連律師個樣都看不清楚）、可有被搜身、搜屋等
ㅤㅤ→ 有無投訴（無飯吃、無水飲、無得去洗手間、無毛氈禦寒等等）
ㅤㅤ→ 特殊需要（例如定時需要服用藥物、聽障等）

問：落口供時，應該如實道來嗎？
Ｃ：→ 只須說：「我無嘢講」 。
ㅤㅤ→ 如果夠硬淨，可以自己落，記得只說：「我無嘢講」；如果驚，就請律師陪同。
ㅤㅤ→ 記得取口供副本。

問：是否要求保釋？
Ｃ：→ 建議「踢保」（即不接受保釋，「坐爆」48 小時）；電視、電影都睇得多，一般情況下，警方不能拘留你多於 48 小時；坐夠 48 小時，身份就回復 innocent person，亦等於無被拉過；而 48 小時是由警方說拘捕時間開始計，一般是上警車起跳，如果之後要到醫院，時間亦計在內。
ㅤㅤ→ 不建議要求保釋，因為需要定時返警署報到，帶來不必要麻煩。

問：不保釋期間，會遭受甚麼對待？
Ｃ：→ 警方在拘捕你後，有權沒收手機；在沒有手機的 48 小時，正常的你應該會悶到發癲。
ㅤㅤ→ 會安排到羈留室（俗稱臭格），內有一張 bench（水泥椅）和一個蹲廁，不是密封的。
ㅤㅤ→ 可要求吃飯、飲水、毛氈（因為冷氣大）。

問：家人來到警署，應該注意甚麼事項？
Ｃ：→ 你只是被拘捕，來落案檢控、未定罪，所以不要問律師你會否有案底、要坐幾耐、會否影響到海外升學（可能出世以來都未諗過）、會否影響移民申請（同樣可能從未諗過）等。
ㅤㅤ→ 家人請謹記配合被捕者的那句：「我無嘢講。」
ㅤㅤ→ 此時此刻，沉默是金。

問：假如朋友或家人懷疑你被拘捕，可以怎樣做？
Ｃ：→ 通知律師，提供全名及身份證號碼（所以咪話在參與示威、遊行前要交低），一般律師團隊會到各區警署查詢，大約半小時可以找到。
